description_long: This object is a modern manual toothbrush with a slim, slightly curved handle made of smooth, gray plastic. The head features a compact cluster of densely packed blue bristles, arranged in several straight rows for effective cleaning. The handle tapers gently from the head to the base, providing an ergonomic grip, and has subtle texturing near the end for improved handling. The bristle section is slightly raised from the handle, allowing for better reach into the mouth. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible logos or decorative elements. The toothbrush appears lightweight and is typical of those found in personal care or hygiene settings.
description: A sleek, gray manual toothbrush with a slim, curved handle and densely packed blue bristles. The design is minimalist and ergonomic, with subtle grip texturing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full head of blue bristles and the slim, straight handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the handle and the raised bristle head.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, untextured back of the handle and head.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the handle's gentle curve and bristle profile.
attribute_bristle_arrangement: The bristles are arranged in several straight, parallel rows, forming a compact rectangular cluster. The bristles are uniform in height and color, with no visible multi-level or angled features.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is slim, gently curved, and tapers toward the base, with subtle texturing near the end for grip. It is made of smooth gray plastic and lacks any prominent ergonomic features or color accents.
